matchRecap.summary: Austria defeated Jordan 3-1 in Group Stage play.
DR Congo and Portugal drew 1-1 in Group Stage action.
England beat Croatia 4-2 in a Group Stage match.
Ghana secured a 1-0 victory over Panama in Group Stage play.

leaderboardSummary: Hubba Hubba CD's Nutz surged to first place, climbing five spots with 8 points gained from Austria and Portugal. Team Choo Choo also made a significant jump, moving up four places to second after England's win. Team koyn, the previous leader, fell to fifth place.
lookingAhead: Today's Group Stage matches include Switzerland vs. Bosnia & Herzegovina, with Team Pahl invested in Switzerland. Qatar vs. Canada features teams picked by Team Camouflage Cndm and Team Godfather, respectively. The marquee matchup is South Korea vs. Mexico, with South Korea picked by Team koyn and Metcalf Hurts, and Mexico by Hubba Hubba CD's Nutz and Team Choo Choo.
